THE_ARCHITECT.talk.STS2_MULUNDUS-HEARTWO: I am angry at the architect
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.STS2_MULUNDUS-EMERALD: I am angry at the architect
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_RASPBERRY_KING.talk.AN: Did you know that sometimes trees dream of having teeth?
No! They just wish they could smile when the sun is out.
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_RASPBERRY_KING.talk.fi: Here, have a raspberry! They are sooo juicy and sweet.
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_RASPBERRY_KING.title: The Raspberry King
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_RAGING_MOUNTAIN.talk.A: Hmmm.. it has been some time since I last saw you. Perhaps something in my hoard can aid you in your quest.
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_RAGING_MOUNTAIN.talk.f: What brings YOU to MY mountain? I would not guess it be the balmy temperature.
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_RAGING_MOUNTAIN.title: The Raging Mountain
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_ETERNAL_FORGE.talk.ANY: Stoicism is not absence of grief or fear or thirst. It is shouldering your burdens without collapse. If you wish to make it out of here alive, steel yourself.
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_ETERNAL_FORGE.talk.fir: The battlefield does not care if your cause is righteous. You will require the aid of my forge.
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_ETERNAL_FORGE.title: The Eternal Forge
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_DREAM_JELLY.talk.ANY.0: Dreams are simply thoughts that no longer obey gravity. Free your thoughts of their limitations so that you might finally escape this place.
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_DREAM_JELLY.talk.first: You believe yourself awake because your memories arrive in order, but I can only be seen in dreams.
STS2_MULUNDUS-THE_DREAM_JELLY.title: The Dream Jelly
